\tzpentry{ID4225}{Delta Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4225 introduces Delta Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \delta A_{\text{GW}} = \epsilon \left|\int \Psi_{\text{solar}} \cdot h_{\mu\nu} \, d^3x\right| \sim 10^{-24} \text{ strain} \end{equation}
